summary: Completed testing of NEW Email Notification feature. All backend API tests (8/8) passed 100%. All frontend UI tests passed. Email notification fields are correctly implemented on both Quick Create page (Step 2) and Generator page with proper data-testid attributes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All email fields and pages working

seed_data_creation: TEST_EmailNotification_Product created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification feature fully tested. Resend API is configured and working. Test emails sent to 'delivered@resend.dev' successfully. The notify_email field is stored in MongoDB but not returned in VideoResponse (by design - uses ConfigDict extra='ignore'). Email is sent when video completes or fails via background task.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/test-email with invalid email format - PASS (handled gracefully)
POST /api/test-email without email field - PASS (returns 422 validation error)
POST /api/videos/generate with notify_email stores in DB - PASS
POST /api/videos/generate with empty string notify_email - PASS
Video response has all required fields - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Quick Create page Step 2 has email field with data-testid='qc-notify-email' - PASS
Quick Create email field label: 'Email for Notification (optional)' - PASS
Quick Create email field placeholder correct - PASS
Quick Create email field is type='email' - PASS
Quick Create email field is fillable and value persists - PASS
Generator page has email field with data-testid='notify-email-input' - PASS
Generator email field label: 'Email Notification (optional)' - PASS
Generator email field placeholder correct - PASS
Generator email field is type='email' - PASS
Generator email field is fillable and value persists - PASS
Quick Create page loads correctly - PASS

email_notification_backend.test_email_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/test-email sends email via Resend
email_notification_backend.notify_email_stored: PASS - notify_email stored in MongoDB videos collection
email_notification_backend.optional_field: PASS - Field is optional, works with null/empty/omitted

email_notification_frontend.quick_create_step_2: PASS - Email field visible with correct label and data-testid
email_notification_frontend.generator_page: PASS - Email field visible with correct label and data-testid
